_comment: Step 5.2 (04-program §5): mutation testing over the FINANCE CALCULATORS — the trust surface (§3.10b), scoped separately from the engine config (stryker.conf.json) so each domain's ratchet floor stays honest. Kill vehicles: the unit tier (calc suites) AND the characterization tier (the 5.1 golden-master grid — SDLT band edges, LTV tiers, LISA caps live there). OPT-IN via `npm run test:mutation:finance`; never part of the default gate. `break` is a RATCHET FLOOR set just under the measured baseline — only ever raised.

commandRunner.command: node tools/run-all-tests.mjs --tier unit && node tools/run-all-tests.mjs --tier characterization
